reviews.title: Bare

reviews.title: Bad accommodation
reviews.text: Terrible, NOT recommended.

reviews.title: Very low-standard service, dirty room, not nice staff
reviews.text:
What is shown in the photos is not the same as in reality. What we received upon arrival was terrible. The staff were neither responsive nor friendly. Everything in the room was different from the photos — much cheaper-looking and totally mismatched. Even the towels and bed sheets were dirty, with yellow stains on them, making them unusable for our faces.
Their so-called "sea view" was not even close to being able to see the sea, and when we raised this issue, they just told us, “it is what it is.” The staff’s attitude was also terrible — irresponsible and unresponsive. The heater didn’t work at all. The floor was wet when we arrived and dirty as well.
My friends and I are hosting other houses in Ho Chi Minh City, and we would never treat our guests the way this host treated us. I’m really disappointed with this experience. My review is 100% real, and I take full responsibility for it.

reviews.title: Fake picture room
reviews.text: Dirty, not well maintained facilities. No hot water. Not recommended

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: This is my first time staying in a condotel & I was very disappointed. The room is cleaned up every two days with very simple tools like broom & mop so it is impossible to be clean in a coastal city when sand is everywhere. The smell in the bath room is terrible even though the exhaust fan is running 24/24. I stayed there for 4 nights but they only provide 2 bottles of drinking water & cleaned once. The view & location are so good.

reviews.title: Phòng dơ, thiếu đồ, dịch vụ rất không chuyên nghiệp

reviews.title: Do not come here, awful stay
reviews.text:
I came here with my partner and the price being too low was definately  a red flag we missed. We were getting poor communication from Day, who would be incharge of the room, he would not reply to us when their were major issues in the hotel i.e TV not working, fridge not working, and the shower having issues with draining. Dat also refused to tell us who his manager was after these issues worsened.
 He would not organise house cleaning, and overall was a poor communicator . The room has major issues as explained above, with no room cleaning.  You are better off paying a little bit extra and getting a better stay as the people in charge here did not make the experience easy nor enjoyable.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text:
When we received the studio, the beds were used by someone else before us. The bed sheets, the pillows, and the blanket were smelly because of the sweat of someone else. The empty cans and bottles were left in the cupboard from the previous user. The bathtub was too high and dangerous to climb out after a bath because it’s slippery. The glasses in the bathroom were dirty. I had to request them to clean my room the next day.
We stayed on the 23rd floor but still heard the loud noise from karaoke from the restaurant/family down the street. They sang the whole night. We had to suffer the noise pollution. I wish they had the sound isolation built for the building! It was a terrible experience for us!

reviews.title: Would not recommend
reviews.text: Starting with the positives, the building was in a good location by the beach and places to eat and bars nearby, and for this price this is okay. However, we arrived to our room which had not been cleaned, stained towel on the floor to wipe our feet, the mugs looked as if they were used as ashtrays, there was chewing gum in the toilet roll holder and on the table, cigarette butts and rubbish in the lining of the door, as well as the sofas and behind bed being FULL of rubbish. The most bugs I have seen in a hotel since staying in Vietnam, in the bed and if you left a drink out there would be a bug in your drink in under 5 minutes. We also inquired about the pool as mentioned when we booked, however we were told by reception that no pool exists. Upon inspection it seems you can use the pool in the other hotel however staff made no mention of this.

reviews.title: Terrible
reviews.text:
Mình book phòng giá 1.030k ở ngay dịp lễ 01.05, mình không có ý kiến gì về giá dịp lễ này nhưng mình đã có 1 trải nghiệm rất tệ ở đây:
1. Vì đây là toà căn hộ nên có rất nhiều phòng, khi mà ngay lễ nhiều người ở full thì thang máy lúc nào cũng đông đúc và chờ lâu; vào giờ cao điểm buổi chiều thì mọi người đi tắm biển về còn nước đầy sàn và cát nữa, dơ kinh khủng
2. Trong đêm chuông báo cháy reo 3 lần, không 1 thông báo nào từ Ban quản lý trấn an mọi người. Team mình hoảng wa đi ngủ rất bất an, lần 3 reo lúc 4h50 sáng là thôi nguyên team dọn đồ đi ngay luôn
3. Phòng không được dọn sạch sẽ lắm và không giống hình lung linh như vậy đâu
4. Không có ăn sáng, không tiện ích gì hết, hồ bơi tính phí riêng
5. Không có chỗ để xe ô tô vì dịp lễ đông mọi người đậu gần như kín xung quanh; dù có chấp nhận trả phí để đậu xe trong toà nhà cũng không còn chỗ

reviews.title: Looks nice but falls flat
reviews.text:
The cleanliness was quite bad. We stopped using housekeeping because it often smelled worse after they cleaned. The bedding is often mismatched, e.g. doona is much smaller than the cover.

The staff/hosts were very inconsistent with responding to issue and/or requests for housekeeping, and we would often find them playing games on their phones in the downstairs cafe while having not responded to a message for 2 hours, or at times just not responding at all until following up multiple times.

Also regarding the hosts communication, we had to get involved multiple times due to the unresponsiveness.

The property itself is fine. Quite spacious and has a kitchen. If you prefer to cook and clean (the entire apartment) yourself, then I'd say this place isn't a bad option. Or if you are only staying a few days.

Mold was a consistent issue in the property. We stayed in multiple different rooms and all of them had issues with the AC dripping water which resulted in having to permanently use the dehumifier setting instead.

Other guests are also very noisy. It is not uncommon to hear extreme shouting, laughing or loud conversations at 2am in the morning.

The clothes rack to dry clothes outside was also extremely rusted and ruined some of our clothes.

TL;DR
Looks nice on the surface, but has systemic issues.

reviews.title: Regret going there and I was happy we could leave
reviews.text: When we arrived, we had to wait in a very warm hall with our young child. The woman at the desk didn't really want to talk to us. The security guard was way nicer. Then a guy showed up and we had to follow him. When he opened the door of the flat, we saw cockroaches on the floor and the walls. When we asked the guy what he could do about it, he just laughed and killed one with his shoe. The place is worn down. I have pictures, but I can't manage to upload them. The room wasn't really clean. There was hair in the bed, the sheets were itchy. I didn't sleep well and I wanted to leave, but I was also really tired. We booked this place partly because of the facilities, but when I asked the lady downstairs about the restaurant, the bar and the swimming pool, she replied with Google Translate that it was just online marketing. Later on, we saw people in the elevator with towels around them and wet hair, so there was a swimming pool. They told us where we could find it. Also, checking out was really strange. We were waiting for the lady to tell us how much we had to pay for the coke we took from the fridge, but she didn't even use Google translate to answer us. She just waved her hand like we were dogs and shouted: go, go. The location was okay, but you have to cross the street to get to the beach. Overall, this has been underwhelming and the worst place I've booked on Agoda so far.

reviews.title: Quality of the provided room
reviews.text:
- The staff at the reception is relatively friendly.
- The staff handling arising situations has a poor attitude, receiving feedback and displaying a bad attitude towards customers.
- The room supports early check-in, but the quality is not commensurate; the room has not been cleaned properly to welcome guests, with dust, fire ants, and flying ants everywhere. The staff's attitude when asked to eliminate the ants: "I can kill them myself," giving the excuse "I can't reach into the corners" while fire ants are crawling everywhere, especially around the bed area. The attitude is very poor!
- They support customers in changing rooms when there is feedback and have learned to clean the rooms relatively thoroughly.
- There is a need to improve the quality of the rooms, all equipment in the room, and to be honest with customers when advising and answering inquiries.

reviews.title: The service is at a decent level.
reviews.text:
The feeling of the rented room here is more like a residential rental rather than a professional hotel service, so it won't be very professional.

1. I stayed for 3 days and 2 nights but the room wasn't cleaned; they only changed the towels.

2. There wasn't a blanket, only a blanket cover to use.

3. The towels provided were not very clean, so bringing your own towels would be better.

4. Besides the toothbrush and toothpaste, shampoo, and body wash, there were no combs, razors, hair caps, or conditioner.

5. Parking in FLC costs at least 3,000 VND, and 20,000 VND for overnight parking.

Overall, the room was clean, the other amenities were good, and the staff was quite helpful when needed.

Beware this isn’t a hotel but an Airbnb. Once checked in there isn’t staff at the front desk. There also isn’t housekeeping nor daily trash removal.

reviews.title: The swimming pool area is not operational.
reviews.text:
Clean, beautiful room.  
19th floor. Balcony with 1/3 sea view. Rooms on the odd-numbered side have a better view.  
The swimming pool on the 3rd floor is temporarily closed without prior notice.  
The hot water system frequently malfunctions, but the staff comes to fix it quickly and is enthusiastic, though it feels a bit awkward having to call repeatedly.  
Parking fees are charged by the hour. Motorbike parking is 3,000 VND for the first 3 hours, then 1,000 VND for each additional hour, and 2,000 VND per hour from 10 PM to 6 AM.  
On average, the parking fee for a day, assuming 3 entries and exits, is about 25,000 to 30,000 VND.  
Room 1918 only has a water purifier and an electric kettle. No hairdryer, no bath towels, no foot mats. No dishes, but there is dishwashing liquid.  
Room 1911 has a washing machine, dryer, bath towels, induction stove, and a complete set of pots, pans, plates, and cups, but no dishwashing liquid.  
Losing the elevator card incurs an extra charge of 100,000 VND.  
There are 4 bottles of water provided. On the second day, if you ask for more bottled water, the staff brings it right away.  
Overall, it's okay for the price.

reviews.title: Good value good location But odd place
reviews.text:
The apartment was very good. Comfortable with good amenities. Washing machine was very appreciated. Location is very good right near the beach and close to great food. The apartment was not very clean. Taps and sink were a bit grubby and used razor in the bathroom. I wouldn’t say it was dirty but it needed a professional
clean. It looks like someone’s Bedsit apartment and they just move out when guests book it? I have no idea how this works but the tower seems like private residences with rooms listed for short term stays. There is a reception but not 24hrs. I have no idea what you would do if you arrived late. The whole place was a bit odd and no information. The listing advertised a swimming pool but it was only open limited hours and then they wouldn’t let us use it because we didn’t have a voucher? No idea how to get a voucher. If you are a very independent traveller than this is a good option. Just don’t expect hotel helpfulness.

reviews.title: If you're a foreigner...a second thought.
reviews.text: Well, it's a residence apartment for mostly Vietnamese family travelers. Each apartment seems to have a different owner and manager, which means the front desk is not helpful at all and I saw only one person (female) worked as a receptionist. Checking-in and out process is a bit tricky. If you don't speak Vietnamese, you might be in trouble. However, it is located in a convenient and relatively developed area (southern part of the Quy Nhơn beach). Value for the money definitely. Just hope that the management system is improved then I will come back again. (FLC group should work harder as the major developer of the region.)

reviews.title: Apartment-type accommodation
reviews.text: It is an apartment-style accommodation, not like a hotel. I was assigned to the 28th floor, and it was a bit disappointing that there was no cooking equipment like an induction stove in the room, but I managed to make the best of it. (Maybe they would have brought one if I had asked.) I heard that the hosts are all different and that the conditions vary, but since it's not a hotel, there is no cleaning service at all. I only had two towels for my five-day stay, but when I inquired through Agoda, they brought more right away. It was very spacious and had a nice view for the price, so I made good use of it. I just wish I hadn't come during the holiday period. I'm not sure if the surrounding bars are usually noisy, but I could hear a lot of noise. The TV was a smart TV, but since I didn't know how to use it, I just kept watching dramas on YouTube. I'm not sure if there are any good restaurants nearby, but there are restaurants, convenience stores, and a motorcycle rental shop, and it's within a 10-15 minute walk from the bus terminal, so it was manageable. I was satisfied with the value for the price.

reviews.title: huge room
reviews.text:
Only stayed here for two nights, have 10 more to go ,but the accommodation is very good, room has a balcony view of the beach ,has the washing machine out there also , room has a large refrigerator with top part being a good size deep freezer.
Room has a kitchen with basic cooking equipment.
Bathroom is also large with a bathtub & over shower or shower wand with a large step out of the tub to the tile floor, this make be an issue for older people.
There is audio noise coming from outside venues which continues late into the night, this may be an issue to light sleepers. Sometimes the more elevated the rooms are the more outside noise they appear to amplify or hear.
I have read many reviews about this accommodation & other hotels & there always seems to be negative ones , but usually we wonder why people have posted such reviews, yes I have stayed in places that I would never recommend, but this is not one of them. Enjoy your stay & there are so many restaurants in this area to explore.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: We had to wait quite a while in the lobby before we could check in, even though we had notified them in advance that we were on our way from the airport. The first apartment we received was quite poorly cleaned and there were a lot of cockroaches. After that, we were moved to another, cleaner apartment, although there were still a few strands of hair on the bedding and trash left in the drawer. The characteristic of this rental apartment is that the cleaning service is not as professional as in hotels. Since we stayed for an extended period, we did our own cleaning and were quite satisfied as the apartment was well-equipped with a washing machine, kitchen, and TV with Netflix, making us feel at home. The building's location is central, with a wide view overlooking the sea and the city, and there are plenty of services nearby, with a short walk to the beach. The hosts are enthusiastic, providing advice and offering car rental and tour services. If you overlook the non-professional service like in a hotel and the reasonable rental price, this is a good choice for your vacation in the beautiful coastal city of Quy Nhơn.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text:
I stayed for two nights at FLC Sea Tower during my trip to Quy Nhon. It was closer to a residence-type accommodation than a hotel, so it was spacious and comfortable. The room had a kitchen and a washing machine, which would be especially good for long stays or family trips.

The location was very close to the sea, and there were many restaurants and cafes around, making it convenient to get around. The sea view from the balcony was also satisfying, and it was nice to relax quietly in the evening.

Check-in had a bit of a set time, so it would be good to contact them in advance, and it doesn't offer as many services as a typical 5-star hotel. However, considering the space and location for the price, I felt it was a sufficiently satisfactory accommodation.

If I come back to Quy Nhon, I would be willing to use it again.

reviews.title: Comfortable experience, great location, suitable for relaxation & family.
reviews.text:
I just had a 3-day, 2-night trip at FLC Sea Tower Quy Nhơn, and I can summarize that I am quite satisfied. This is not a traditional hotel but a hotel apartment with a sea view that is very convenient – like a vacation apartment, suitable for family or friends groups.

Points I liked:

📍 The location is close to the beach and the center – just a few minutes' walk to the beach, with plenty of restaurants and cafes around, so there's no worry about "going out, having trouble eating."

🌅 The sea view from the balcony is very beautiful, especially at sunset. The balcony is spacious, and the sitting area for chilling at night is quite nice.

🛋️ The apartment is fully equipped – kitchen, washing machine, large living area, strong wifi, and the rooms are much larger compared to regular hotels in the same price range.

👨‍👩‍👧‍👦 Very suitable for families or groups of friends, as there are options from small Studio apartments to spacious 2-3 bedroom apartments.

A few points to note:

📅 Check-in/Check-out can be a bit strict on timing (usually check-in at 14:00 – check out before 12:00), so be mindful of timing with your travel schedule.

🧹 Since it's a "condotel" type apartment, traditional hotel services (restaurant, spa) are not as centralized as in a true 5-star resort, so if you expect completely high-end service, you may feel it's not full-service.

In summary:
FLC Sea Tower is a very good choice if you want a spacious and free vacation close to the beach in Quy Nhơn at a reasonable price, especially for family or friends traveling together. If you prioritize all-inclusive resort services, you might want to consider other options – but for the needs of the majority, I find it quite decent and worth experiencing.

reviews.title: Should you stay at FLC Sea Tower?
reviews.text: I would like to say that it is highly recommended. My family just spent 3 nights at the beginning of summer in Quy Nhơn. The place is one of the most magnificent buildings in Quy Nhơn. It is located very close to the beach. Surrounding it are many restaurants, cafes, and seafood places that are very convenient. The room is beautiful, no different from a 4 to 5-star hotel. It has full amenities like a washing machine, hairdryer, and iron. The room includes a large bed plus a multi-functional sofa that is almost like a bed. It is very convenient for a family of 4 to 5 people. The prices are generally very cheap compared to staying in a hotel. Breakfast and lunch can be ordered online. However, parking for a car in the basement is quite expensive, at 10,000 VND/hour. On the first day, not knowing this, I ended up paying 115,000 VND for one night of parking. On the following days, I parked outside for free and it was also safe. Overall, I highly recommend staying here, everyone.

reviews.text:
Die Bilder dieser Unterkunft waren sehr vielversprechend, aber leider kann ich bis auf die besondere Aussicht keine Punkte vergeben, ganz im Gegenteil. Ich habe mich das erste Mal in Vietnam in einer Unterkunft sehr unwohl gefühlt, und ich bin nicht wählerisch. 
In Kürze die Mängel: Kühlschrank ist sehr laut, so dass schlafen ohne Ohropax nicht ging. Die Möbel sind alt, aber viel schlimmer ist, dass alles schmutzig und keimig ist, so dass man den Eindruck hat, hier wird kaum oder nur oberflächlich geputzt. Zum Teil sehr ekelig, dass man manche Gegenstände nur ungern anfässt. Es gibt Flecken auf Handtüchern, Decke und Sofakissen sowie an Wänden.
Keine Steckdose in Nähe des Bettes, lediglich eine im Küchenbereich, die für den Wasserkocher gebraucht wird. Ansonsten ist die Küche nahezu unbrauchbar, weil kaum Ausstattung vorhanden ist.
Es gibt zwar eine Waschmaschine, die ich allerdings nicht ausprobieren konnte, da es keinerlei Gelegenheit zum Aufhängen der Wäsche gab.
Der Pool war geschlossen ohne Auskunft warum oder wie lange.
Der Balkon ist unbrauchbar, da es wegen der Klimaanlage sehr laut ist und zudem keine Sitzmöglichkeiten oder ein Tisch vorhanden sind.  
Matratze liegt sich wie ein Stein. Insgesamt keine schöne Erfahrung!

reviews.title: Gute Aussicht, aber Schimmel, beschädigtes Kochfeld und sehr einfache Küchenausstattung
reviews.text:
Das Apartment im FL Sea Tower bietet eine schöne Aussicht und einen Balkon mit einem kleinen Tisch, Pflanzen und zwei Stühlen, was angenehm war. Positiv waren außerdem die Waschmaschine, ein großer Kühlschrank sowie einige bereitgestellte Getränke und Instant-Nudeln. Die Couch war bequem, auch wenn sie Flecken hatte.
Die Küchenausstattung war jedoch sehr einfach. Es gab nur eine Pfanne und einen Topf. Ansonsten hauptsächlich Plastikteller, Plastikschüsseln und Plastikbecher. Das Besteck stand in einer Plastiktasse. Ein Abwaschlappen oder ein Tuch zum Abtrocknen fehlten. Erst nach Nachfrage wurden etwas Spülmittel und ein Schwamm bereitgestellt.
Auch der Zustand des Apartments war problematisch. Das Kochfeld hatte mehrere Risse im Glas. An der Decke oberhalb der Küchenschränke waren Feuchtigkeitsspuren und Schimmel zu sehen. An den Küchenschränken waren Schmutz und Wischspuren sichtbar. Sowohl die Übergardine als auch die normale Gardine waren aus der Führung gerutscht.
Im Badezimmer gab es ebenfalls Probleme. Es gab nur kaltes Wasser. Rund um die Badewanne war Schimmel am Silikon zu sehen. Außerdem waren rostartige Flecken rund um die Halterung des Toilettensitzes sichtbar.
Ein weiterer Nachteil war der starke Baulärm in der Umgebung.
Insgesamt hat das Apartment zwar eine schöne Aussicht und einige praktische Dinge wie Waschmaschine und Balkon, aber wegen des Zustands, der Feuchtigkeit und der sehr einfachen Küchenausstattung wären deutliche Verbesserungen notwendig.

reviews.title: Schöner Meerblick, aber mehrere Probleme bei Sauberkeit und Zustand
reviews.text:
Das Apartment im FL Sea Tower in Quy Nhon hat einen schönen Meerblick und war mit etwa 14 € pro Nacht sehr günstig. Positiv waren das bequeme Bett, eine Waschmaschine im Apartment und ein großer Kühlschrank mit Gefrierfach. Außerdem wurden Toilettenartikel bereitgestellt, zum Beispiel Zahnbürsten, Rasierer, Ohrenstäbchen und ein Kamm. Auch Shampoo und Duschgel waren vorhanden. Im Gebäude selbst gibt es einen Pool im dritten Stock, ein Café und einen Friseur.
Allerdings gab es mehrere Probleme. Das Sofa war stark durchgesessen und hatte Flecken, auch der kleine Hocker war fleckig. In der Küche gab es nur einen einzigen Topf zum Kochen und wichtige Dinge wie Spülmittel, Schwamm oder Geschirrtuch fehlten.
Auch bei Sauberkeit und Pflege gab es Mängel. An den Wänden waren Feuchtigkeitsflecken, die Glasscheiben des Geschirrschranks hatten sichtbare Wischspuren und die Badarmaturen waren verkalkt. Rund um die Badewanne war das Silikon schimmelig. Die Gestaltung des Badezimmers ist zudem unpraktisch zum Duschen, weil kein Duschvorhang vorhanden ist und Wasser stehen bleibt. Während meines Aufenthalts gab es außerdem kein warmes Wasser und die Handtücher waren sehr dünn.
Ein weiterer Nachteil war der Lärm. Neben Verkehrslärm gab es auch Baustellenlärm, sodass der Meerblick zwar schön ist, aber nicht wirklich ruhig zu genießen war.
Insgesamt ist der Preis zwar niedrig und die Aussicht schön, aber wegen der Sauberkeit, des Zustands des Apartments und des Lärms würde ich diese Unterkunft eher nicht weiterempfehlen.

reviews.title: Fantastisch
reviews.text:
Bei unsere Ankunft haben wir uns im ersten Moment schwer getan, weil ausgerechnet in diesem Moment die Rezeption nicht besetzt war und wir nicht wussten, das es sich um ein herkömmliches Hotel handelt. Allerdings wurden wir bald darauf bestens betreut. Das Personal ist sehr hilfsbereit und freundlich. Das Apartment war hervorragend: geräumig, sauber, geschmackvoll eingerichtet mit angenehmer Beleuchtung und vielen Steckdosen. Das Warmwasser hat nicht gleich funktioniert, aber auf Anfrage kam innerhalb von wenigen Minuten ein junger Mann, der es eingestellt oder repariert hat. Die Aussicht aus den 26. Stock ist fantastisch und es ist durch die Höhe auch angenehm ruhig. 
Gleich vor der Türe gibt es viele Restaurants, Straßenlokale, einen Supermarkt. Unser Fahrzeug konnten wir sicher in der Tiefgarage parken.

reviews.title: 이상하고 위험한 숙소입니다
reviews.text:
3박 머물렀습니다 3일차에 모르는 사람이 벨을 눌러서 문열고 나갔습니다 그사람 손에  공구 몇개 들고 있었어요 그는 영어가 안되서 그가 핸드폰으로 번역해서 보여줬어요  발코니를 첵크한다하더군요 저는 번역할수 있는 수단이 없어 기달리라고 한다음 핸드폰을 가지로 갔어요 근데 그가 무단 침입하더니 호텔방과 발바로니를 보고 나갔어요 그리고 1시간후 또 다른 사람이 방문해서 뜬금없이 언제 체크하냐고 물어봅니다 누구냐하니 핸드폰을 보여줍니다 가정부랍니다 하우스키핑 스텝인가해서 내일 12시에 나간다 말했습니다 다음날  모르는 사람이 11시쯤 또 방문합니다 또 언제나가냐 물어봅니다 12시에 나간다고 직원한테 말했다 했습니다 제방문앞에서 1시간 기달리더니 짐싸고 나갈려는 제게 키를 달라합니다 키는 데스크에 줘야 한다고 말하고 짐들고 친구방에 방문하고 같이 체크아웃하고 나갈라하다 먼가 이상해방에 갔더니 방문을 열어두고 못닫게 현관문을 잠궈놨어요 제가 다 강제로 쫒아내고 문닫고 데스크에 키 반납하고 떠났어요 
지금 생각해보니 제방에 방문했던 모든 사람들이 유니폼을 착용하지 않았어요 직원 사칭 범죄일수도 있어요 
만약 이 글을 보신다면 저 처럼 방문을 열어주지 마시고 호스트에게 연락하여 상황을 설명해주시기 바랍니다
숙소측은 방문전 고객에게 꼭 연락하시기 바랍니다

reviews.title: 不推荐，服务太差了
reviews.text: 不推荐，服务太差了。同住在同一幢klc，同等价位的另一家，每天房东会过来问有没有什么需要的，需要水吗？需要打扫吗？这家前台联系房东办理入住，等房东一个多小时才来到大堂（经历过别家两分钟来办理入住，十分钟左右到来算正常），一个多小时傻等挺让人恼火的。总共住了6天，除了第二天主动发信息要了几瓶水和干净毛巾（最终只给了两瓶水，两条毛巾，入住只配了一条毛巾），再往后直接人消失了，没再配备饮用水，更别提问你是否有需要。公寓不打扫我也能理解，水不值钱，不应该按天配备吗？那东西也不值钱。没想到那么差的体验，按行程预定了续住，续住不能退款只能住。续住提前24多小时联系，等信息更是个轮回，石沉大海。服务太差了，同一幢楼那么多其他的酒店，建议考虑其他家的。

reviews.text: Tôi chưa bao giờ du lịch 1 nơi tệ như vậy. 1 năm tôi đi du lịch phải cả chục lần. Hầu như kín hết các nơi có biển. Khi tôi đến nhận phòng tầm 3h chiều gọi nhân viên nhận phòng thì phải đứng đợi 1 hồi lâu. Lên nhận phòng lại phải đợi cái thang máy. Vào được phòng thì phòng mất nắp bồm tắm lại phải đợi tiếp. View nhìn ra mấy công trình đang xây dựng dở dang. Phòng wifi ko xài được do ko đóng tiền mạng. Hôi thối ẩm mốc cũ kỹ. Ko như nhiều đánh giá được mua. Khu vực này thì chả có j chơi và mọi thứ đều đắt đỏ. Mọi người có ý định đi Quy Nhơn thì nên tìm khách sạn ở 2 đầu Quy Nhơn đừng chọn khúc giữa này. Và lưu ý là xe gửi ở đây tính tiền theo từng giờ nhé. Ko có j là free đâu. Có yêu cầu gì hỏi nhân viên bọn nó cũng ko trả lời cho đâu!!! Thân gửi!!!

reviews.title: Sẽ không quay lại lần nữa
reviews.text:
Đây là chung cư và kinh doanh kiểu homestay. Gia đình mình đi 10 người, ở 3 phòng và nhà mình quyết định sẽ không quay lại lần nữa với những lý do sau:
- Gia đình mình đến nơi lúc 21h và nhân viên sales đón tiếp gia đình mình là 1 bạn nam mặc áo thun và quần đùi. 
- 3 phòng của gia đình mình đều có vấn đề. Phòng 1 thì trong phòng tắm vẫn còn khăn tắm dơ chưa dọn. Phòng 2 thì ghế trong phòng bị gãy. Phòng 3 thì chỗ bồn tắm không được cọ rửa sạch sẽ, dép mang trong phòng tắm thì chiếc nọ chiếc kia. 
Gia đình mình rất thất vọng về nơi ở này và sẽ không quay lại lần nữa.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: Dịch vụ và hướng dẫn của nhân viên căn hộ rất tệ.  Phòng dọn sơ sài, ko có những vật dụng cơ bản như dầu gội, sữa tắm, khăn lau. Gọi nhân viên thì các bạn mới lên thêm cho ít dầu gội… ko thân thiện… phòng tắm ko có rèm ko có cửa ngăn, nên khi tắm sẽ văng tung toé cả phòng (và ko có khăn lau hay chùi chân trong phòng tắm). Phòng tắm bí nên rất dễ bốc mùi cả phòng… Nói chung là ko hài lòng so với mức giá bỏ ra

reviews.title: Ép KH
reviews.text: Khoá cửa của home có vấn đề , sử dụng loại rẻ tiền . Vừa mở cửa ra là gãy, trong khi trong nhà đã có 1 bộ khoá đã thay sẳn để ở lại. Có nghĩa là khoá cửa đó đã gãy nhiều lần, trước đó khách khác cũng bị và ép khách phải bồi thường, ép là do khách sử dụng lực mạnh tác động lên cửa làm hư. Cái cửa chỉ đẩy ra đẩy vô thì làm sao mà tác động lực mạnh lên như chủ home nói được. Cái cửa nó có vấn đề từ trước, khung khoá nó bị lệch, gây ra kẹt. Chủ home đổ lỗi cho khách và k chịu trách nhiệm về vấn đề này. Mình k phải là khách đầu tiên bị , nhiều khách đã bị trước đó rồi. Nói chung là cách xử lí home tệ, mn nên cẩn thận về khoá cửa và các thiết bị trong nhà.

reviews.title: lừa đảo

reviews.title: Rất dơ, rất rất dơ
reviews.text:
Ít khi review xấu khách sạn nào, mà phòng ở đây dơ đến nổi phải viết cho mọi người biết. Phòng rất bụi, từ bàn ghế, giường ngủ đến sofa là từng lớp nha. Phòng tắm nó dơ má ơi lun, luôn luôn hôi mùi nước tiểu của ai đó. Mình đề nghị đổi phòng thì kêu đã hết rồi.
Mọi ngừoi xem cái kính phòng tắm còn có về tay bám trên, tối ngủ như gặp ma. Phòng toàn mạng nhện, và nhận mạnh lần nữa.
Rất rất dơ, hôi, bẩn từ khăn tắm nó ố vàng đền phòng tắm có vết "rất kì" (mọi người tự đoán ha). 
Không bao giờ quay lại

reviews.title: Dịch vụ và sale cực kỳ tệ và thiếu chuyên nghiệp, thiếu tôn trọng khách hàng.
reviews.text:
Sale tự ý lấy phòng đã đặt cho ng khác, ghép mình với ng lạ vào chung 1 căn hộ nhưng không báo trước, không hỏi ý kiến hay sự đồng ý của mình (dù trước đó mình đã đến sớm gửi hành lý và đã dặn để phòng giống như mình đã đặt). Khi mình liên hệ trc để checkin mới thông báo thông qua 1 bạn nv.
Gọi sale không nghe máy, rất bất bình nhưng gọi trên 10 cuộc vẫn k nghe máy và không hề liên hệ lại.
Sau khi bạn mình nói sẽ đến sảnh lễ tân và làm ầm lên cho rõ vấn đề thì mới chịu đưa ra phương án hỗ trợ.
Rồi sau đó sắp xếp đại cho mình 1 phòng, thiếu thốn đủ thứ điện nv cung cấp cũng không đưa, 1 chai nước cũng không có. 
Một trải nghiệm thật tồi tệ cùng với FLC Sea Tower.

reviews.text:
Mình đi du lịch gia đình gồm có tất cả 6nl và 2te. Mặc dù đặt phòng trc khi đến từ lâu nhưng chủ nhà k sắp xếp để cả đoàn đc ở gần nhau. Làm 1 nhóm ở tầng 10 và 1 nhóm phải ở tầng 21, đi lại rất bất tiện. Ngoài ra phòng mình ở k có thẻ phòng để quẹt mà phải bấm mã số. Nhưng hệ thống mã số bị lỗi, nhận mật khẩu rất lâu. Mỗi lần ra khỏi phòng đi ra ngoài chơi, khi trở về mở phòng rất khó khăn. Yêu cầu đc đổi phòng nhưng k được hỗ trợ
Ngoài ra các thiết bị và đồ dùng trong phòng cũng sơ sài, k như quảng cáo. Mắc phơi quần áo, bếp... phòng có phòng không. Nước đóng chai đc cấp phát 2 chai duy nhất. Nếu cần thêm phải gọi rất bất tiện. Hồ bơi muốn sử dụng phải trả phí riêng

reviews.title: Phòng bẩn lắm
reviews.text: Phòng bẩn lắm ạ. Biết là giá rẻ nên cũng không đòi hỏi nhiều nhưng ít nhất chăn và sàn giá vẫn phải sạch. Đây nhận phòng ga giường nền nhà toàn cát, sạn. Gối phụ trong tủ mốc vàng, chăn phụ hôi nhắn xin đổi khăn thì oke xong mất tích. Đường cống wc bốc mùi khá hôi. Được cái vì trị thì thuận tiện vì là khu trung tâm.

reviews.title: Lần đầu đặt căn hộ, không hài lòng
reviews.text:
- ở tầng 29 nhưng chuông báo cháy kêu liên tục, rất bất an.
- ở 2 ngày không có dịch vụ dọn phòng sau 1 ngày.
- chăn ga tạm dùng được, lavabo nghẹt đề nghị kiểm tra nhưng không kiểm tra.
- đi dịp lễ thang máy rất đông, nên lưu ý.

reviews.title: Không giống hình và mô tả
reviews.text:
Thang máy kẹt liên tục các giờ cao điểm.
Bãi xe thu phí quá cao.
Hồ bơi bẩn và nhỏ mà thu phí 50k/ng. Trẻ 1 tuổi cũng thu.
Đậu xe trước cổng bảo vệ xin tiền đểu.
